root_cause: SQL execution exception
solution: Check SQL statements or database status

root_cause: At the beginning of the month, due to time zone differences, data in soa_interaction_log was inserted into the August table, while automation queried the September table, causing validation failure
solution: Modify the automation query logic

root_cause: No available data
solution: Prepare test data or check the data preparation process

root_cause: Failed to select offer, UiPath code needs to be updated
solution: Modify automation code

root_cause: billingcheck
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: Could not write the DataTable starting with cell A3, failed to write Excel file
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: Order workflow was stuck for 5 hours before continuing
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: Product attribute component array out of bounds
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: OnlineDate is within 48 hours and cannot be canceled

root_cause: The replace SIM option was not clicked, but the component marked it as successfully executed

root_cause: Abnormal TDC region configuration data

root_cause: Script parameters not initialized
solution: Initialize script parameters or fix script logic

root_cause: SIM card unavailable prompt appears for the customer
solution: Replace the customer

root_cause: Abnormal page display caused incorrect selection of insurance contact method
solution: Clear browser cache

root_cause: User not found under the customer
solution: Replace the customer

root_cause: OSE missing Jira ID, causing incorrect Error Summary display
solution: Optimize data configuration

root_cause: Preconditions not executed, possibly related to changing the customer
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: SAP stub was modified but not reset, resulting in all orders being future orders
solution: Restore SAP stub after modification

root_cause: SFF returned 200, TDC stub issue
solution: Rerun the case

root_cause: not enough arguments for format string
solution: Check cfg_test_case_data configuration

root_cause: Opennet address unavailable

root_cause: Insufficient inventory
solution: Replenish inventory or adjust inventory configuration

root_cause: Offer configuration changed
solution: Configure dedicated offers for automation, prefixed with 'auto'

root_cause: Find Offer failed!
solution: Page loading too slow, offer not displayed in time

root_cause: Submit order failed
solution: If the customer is newly created, check whether a retail account exists

root_cause: Offer modified, additional prompt appears when selecting offer
solution: Enhance offer component to handle this scenario or adjust offer configuration

root_cause: Component content did not initialize DealNumberSerie
solution: Check input parameters of the component

root_cause: pushc not found
solution: Check whether pass_rate in test_dispatcher_data is set to 0

root_cause: No available user found
solution: Execute data preparation cases

root_cause: Environment issue causing offer information not to display
solution: Further analyze logs or contact the relevant system owner

root_cause: Offer configuration changed, additional double SIM add-on introduced
solution: Enhance offer component to handle this scenario or adjust offer configuration

root_cause: OMP execution order not set to serial, causing concurrency conflicts
solution: Adjust execution order to Serial

root_cause: Process execution delay
solution: Optimize process execution efficiency

root_cause: Insufficient ICCID resources
solution: Replenish ICCID resources or check resource pool

root_cause: Failed to get oseOrderId or CRM order ID
